name: Raise My Score
description_short: Credit Boosters offers personalized credit repair services across Texas with Board Certified Credit Consultants, challenging negative items on credit reports for a flat fee with no hidden costs.
description_long:
Credit Boosters operates as a credit repair service with physical offices in Dallas-Fort Worth, El Paso, Houston, San Antonio, and Las Cruces, Texas. The company emphasizes in-person and phone consultations with real credit professionals rather than automated services, positioning itself against competitors they view as impersonal or expensive.

The company's core services include disputing invalid collections, charge-offs, medical bills, and judgments on behalf of clients. They contact creditors, manage documentation, and guide clients through the credit repair process with the stated goal of improving credit scores in approximately six months. Credit Boosters explicitly markets itself against monthly-fee models, instead offering what they describe as an affordable flat-rate structure with couples discounts available.

Credit Boosters differentiates itself through staff certifications from the Credit Consultants Association (Board Certified Credit Consultants, Certified Credit Repair Specialists, Certified Credit Score Consultants, FCRA Certified Specialists) and reports receiving an A+ rating from Expertise.com. The company emphasizes personalized service, bonded staff, and competitive pricing structured as a one-time flat fee rather than ongoing monthly charges or per-account fees.

As a credit repair company, Credit Boosters operates within the FCRA regulatory framework and challenges negative items on behalf of clients. However, like all credit repair services, the company cannot remove accurate negative information, only dispute potentially erroneous items. The timeline of approximately six months for results is typical for the industry but not guaranteed, and results depend on the validity of disputes.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Board Certified staff through Credit Consultants Association (multiple certifications listed: BCCC, CCRS, CCSC, FCRA Certified)
Flat-rate pricing model explicitly designed to avoid monthly fees or per-account charges that can compound costs
Multiple Texas office locations allowing face-to-face appointments in Dallas-Fort Worth, El Paso, Houston, San Antonio, and Las Cruces
A+ rating from Expertise.com with specific recognition for challenging collections, charge-offs, medical bills, and judgments
All staff reportedly bonded and trained in current FCRA regulations and credit reporting practices
Willingness to recommend legal action against creditors at their expense when appropriate
cons: No specific pricing information disclosed on website, requiring phone contact to learn actual flat-rate cost
Stated six-month timeline for credit improvement is not guaranteed and depends on dispute validity
Cannot remove accurate negative information from credit reports, only dispute potentially erroneous items
Limited service area restricted to Texas (no national or remote-only option mentioned)
No information provided about success rates, number of accounts typically disputed, or average score improvements
best_for: Texas residents with collections, charge-offs, or medical bills they believe are inaccurate on their credit reports
Consumers who prefer working with live advisors rather than automated platforms
Couples seeking joint credit repair with discount pricing
People considering bankruptcy or debt settlement who want to explore credit repair first as potentially faster alternative
diagnosis: Credit Boosters is best suited for Texas residents with disputed negative items on their credit reports who value personalized service from certified professionals and prefer a flat-fee model over monthly subscriptions. The key caveat is that credit repair services can only remove inaccurate or unverifiable items—they cannot eliminate legitimate negative information, and results depend entirely on the validity of disputes filed.
services: Disputing invalid collections on credit reports
Disputing medical bills reported to credit bureaus
Creditor contact and negotiation on behalf of clients
Credit report documentation management and submission
Face-to-face credit consultations at office locations
Credit score analysis and identification of highest-impact negative items
Credit repair guidance and financial recommendations during service period
Couples credit repair services with discount pricing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 600 W 6th St Ste 400, Fort Worth, TX 76102
